nasb.text: There were those who dwelt in darkness and in the shadow of death, Prisoners in misery and chains,

esv.text: Some sat in darkness and in the shadow of death, prisoners in affliction and in irons,

cnv.text: 他們有些人坐在黑暗和死蔭裡， 被困苦和鐵鍊捆鎖著；

ccb.text: 有些人坐在黑暗里， 在死亡的阴影下， 被铁链捆绑， 痛苦不堪。

csbs.text: 一些人坐在黑暗和死荫里， 是苦难和铁索中的囚徒；
